"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2024.3.2\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Algorithms_MazeRunner.dir/objects.a
"C:\PROGRA~1\JetBrains\CLion 2024.3.2\bin\mingw\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\Algorithms_MazeRunner.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Algorithms_MazeRunner.dir\objects1.rsp
"C:\PROGRA~1\JetBrains\CLion 2024.3.2\bin\mingw\bin\g++.exe"  -std=c++11 -lmingw32 -g -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Algorithms_MazeRunner.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o Algorithms_MazeRunner.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libAlgorithms_MazeRunner.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Algorithms_MazeRunner.dir\linkLibs.rsp
